creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
While ldd doesn't list any llvm libraries for bin/ispc, finding ispc with cmake is broken -

-- Found Intel SPMD Compiler (ISPC): /usr/local/bin/ispc
Shared object "libLLVM-5.0.so" not found, required by "ispc"

So it appears that ispc is manually loading the llvm libs at runtime, which leads to llvm needing to be added to RUN_DEPENDS

This is reported by graphics/embree and can be found in pkg-status builds

http://package22.nyi.freebsd.org/data/111amd64-default-PR224992/2018-01-30_06h44m40s/logs/errors/embree-2.17.1.log
